chunks.heading: Purpose
chunks.text: Worktree Detail is the focused view for one worktree. Use it when you need terminal actions, runtime controls, task assignment, and branch-specific context.

chunks.heading: Core actions
chunks.text: The detail page surfaces open terminal, run local command, and play Groove command for the selected worktree. Commands use workspace command templates and substitute the current worktree path.

chunks.heading: Task assignment
chunks.text: A worktree can be linked to a workspace task so planning and execution stay aligned. Assignments are stored in workspace metadata and shown on both dashboard and detail views.
